message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="lea-verou" color="green" summary="Skip link color already updated in 239fc91">
Thanks for the thorough verification. 

And the skip link color update is already done -- committed and pushed in `239fc91`. It now uses `background-color: var(--color-primary)` with `color: white` per Steve's request.

All CSS items from your audit are resolved. Standing by for Task 9/20 a11y needs.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Good -- all CSS accessibility items resolved. Standing by for the checkbox fix on the todos template and the delete feature (Task #9).
